title: Parkio Daily for May 5, 2026
teaser: Star Wars update coming May 22 to Millennium Falcon: Smugglers Run. Plus: May the 4th celebrations across Disney parks.

rides.name: Star Wars: Rise of the Resistance
rides.note: Join the battle between Resistance and First Order

rides.name: Millennium Falcon: Smugglers Run
rides.note: New mission with Mando and Grogu starts May 22

rides.name: Star Tours
rides.note: Classic Star Wars adventure through the galaxy

bignews.title: New Mandalorian Mission Coming to Millennium Falcon May 22
bignews.body: A brand-new mission launches May 22 on Millennium Falcon: Smugglers Run at both Disneyland and Walt Disney World. Flight crews will join the Mandalorian and Grogu to track down bounties for the New Republic, visiting Cloud City on Bespin, Coruscant, or the wreckage of the second Death Star above Endor. The interactive experience puts guests in control as pilots, gunners, or engineers aboard the iconic ship.

topstories.title: Shadows of Memory Nighttime Show Transforms Batuu
topstories.body: A stunning nighttime spectacle is now playing at Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge in Disneyland. "Shadows of Memory: A Skywalker Saga" uses projection effects and iconic music to tell the legendary story of the Skywalker family on the spires of Batuu. Guests can gather near the Millennium Falcon to witness the greatest moments in galactic history come to life.

topstories.title: Fire of the Rising Moons Fireworks Light Up Black Spire
topstories.body: Select nights at Disneyland's Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge feature "Fire of the Rising Moons," a fireworks spectacular that brings bursts of color and iconic Star Wars music to the skies above Black Spire Outpost. The show can be viewed from multiple locations including near the Millennium Falcon, Droid Depot, and Black Spire Surplus.

topstories.title: Star Wars Characters Roaming Galaxy's Edge Timeline
topstories.body: Iconic Star Wars characters from across the saga can now be spotted throughout Galaxy's Edge at Disneyland. Guests may encounter Darth Vader and Imperial Stormtroopers, Luke Skywalker, Leia Organa, Han Solo, the Mandalorian and Grogu, R2-D2, Rey, and more as they explore Black Spire Outpost.

spotlight.title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu Hits Theaters May 22
spotlight.body: The new Star Wars film arrives in theaters the same day as the new Millennium Falcon mission. The movie's release coincides with expanded Star Wars experiences across Disney parks, cruises, and merchandise collections, offering fans new ways to engage with the galaxy far, far away both on screen and in person.
